# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: migration-vnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Virtual Network
  vnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/16
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the VNet
  subnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: workload-subnet
    metadata:
      description: Name of the subnet with service endpoints
  subnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.1.0/24
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the workload subnet
  gatewaySubnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.255.0/27
    metadata:
      description: Address prefix for the GatewaySubnet (for on-premises connectivity)
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[concat('stmigration', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Storage Account
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[concat('sql-migration-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Server
  sqlAdminLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: migrationdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database
  allowedOnPremisesIpRange:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 203.0.113.0/24
    metadata:
      description: On-premises IP range allowed to access resources during migration
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: migration
    allowedValues:
      - migration
      - production
      - development
    metadata:
      description: Environment tag for the deployment

variables:
  nsgName: "[concat(parameters('subnetName'), '-nsg')]"
  storageAccountId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  sqlServerId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
  subnetId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"

resources:
  # Network Security Group for the workload subnet
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[variables('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: service-endpoint-security
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: AllowHTTPSOutbound
          properties:
            priority: 100
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Storage
            description: Allow outbound HTTPS to Azure Storage via service endpoint
        - name: AllowSQLOutbound
          properties:
            priority: 110
            direction: Outbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: Tcp
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "1433"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: Sql
            description: Allow outbound traffic to Azure SQL via service endpoint
        - name: AllowOnPremisesInbound
          properties:
            priority: 200
            direction: Inbound
            access: Allow
            protocol: "*"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "*"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "[parameters('allowedOnPremisesIpRange')]"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            description: Allow inbound traffic from on-premises during migration

  # Virtual Network with Service Endpoints enabled on the workload subnet
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01"
    name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: service-endpoint-connectivity
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[parameters('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
            serviceEndpoints:
              - service: Microsoft.Storage
                locations:
                  - "[parameters('location')]"
                  - "*"
              - service: Microsoft.Sql
                locations:
                  - "[parameters('location')]"
                  - "*"
            privateEndpointNetworkPolicies: Enabled
        - name: GatewaySubnet
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[parameters('gatewaySubnetAddressPrefix')]"

  # Storage Account with service endpoint rules and public access fallback
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: migration-storage
      connectivity: service-endpoint-with-public-fallback
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      networkAcls:
        # Default action is Allow to permit public access as fallback for on-premises
        defaultAction: Allow
        bypass: AzureServices
        virtualNetworkRules:
          - id: "[variables('subnetId')]"
            action: Allow
            state: Succeeded
        ipRules:
          - value: "[first(split(parameters('allowedOnPremisesIpRange'), '/'))]"
            action: Allow

  # Blob service for storage account
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
    properties:
      deleteRetentionPolicy:
        enabled: true
        days: 7

  # Storage container for migration data
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/migration-data')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      publicAccess: None

  # SQL Server with service endpoint rules and public access fallback
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: migration-database
      connectivity: service-endpoint-with-public-fallback
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      restrictOutboundNetworkAccess: Disabled

  # SQL Server - VNet rule for service endpoint connectivity
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/virtualNetworkRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/allow-workload-subnet')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
    properties:
      virtualNetworkSubnetId: "[variables('subnetId')]"
      ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint: false

  # SQL Server - Firewall rule to allow Azure services
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAllAzureIps')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  # SQL Server - Firewall rule to allow on-premises IP range
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowOnPremises')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[first(split(parameters('allowedOnPremisesIpRange'), '/'))]"
      endIpAddress: "[first(split(parameters('allowedOnPremisesIpRange'), '/'))]"

  # SQL Database
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: migration-database
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
    sku:
      name: S1
      tier: Standard
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 268435456000
      zoneRedundant: false

  # SQL Server - Auditing policy for security monitoring during migration
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('sqlServerId')]"
      - "[variables('storageAccountId')]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[reference(variables('storageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(variables('storageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"
      retentionDays: 30
      auditActionsAndGroups:
        - SUCCESSFUL_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - FAILED_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - BATCH_COMPLETED_GROUP
      isStorageSecondaryKeyInUse: false
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

outputs:
  vnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]"
  subnetId:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('subnetId')]"
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
  storageAccountBlobEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(variables('storageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(variables('sqlServerId'), '2023-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
  serviceEndpointsEnabled:
    type: array
    value:
      - Microsoft.Storage
      - Microsoft.Sql
  connectivityNote:
    type: string
    value: "Service endpoints are enabled for Storage and SQL on the workload subnet. Public access remains available as fallback for on-premises connectivity during migration. After migration is complete, consider restricting defaultAction to Deny on storage and removing public firewall rules on SQL Server."
